envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key — get from simmer.markets/dashboard

envVars.name: TRADING_VENUE
envVars.description: Default trading venue (sim / polymarket / kalshi). Overridden by the venue argument to client.preflight().

envVars.name: EXPOSURE_CAP_USD
envVars.description: Maximum total open exposure in USD across real venues. Defaults to 100.0 if not set.
